description: Kernel provides cloud-based browsers and related infrastructure for AI agents, including browser automation, code execution for agent apps, and tooling for observing and managing those sessions. It also offers a hosted MCP server and CLI for interacting with those capabilities.
summary: Kernel exposes a bearer-authenticated HTTP API at `api.onkernel.com`, an OAuth/API-key authenticated remote MCP server at `mcp.onkernel.com/mcp`, and the `kernel` CLI installable via Homebrew or npm.
